title: eleusine digitaria
intro: Eleusine digitaria, also known as finger millet or ragi, is a type of cereal crop that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Eleusine digitaria include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving digestion. The herbal preparations of Eleusine digitaria include whole grain flour, extracts, and supplements, which can be used to make various products such as bread, porridge, and tea.
